# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for all resources"
      }
    },
    "vnetName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "vnet-serviceendpoints",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Virtual Network"
      }
    },
    "vnetAddressPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "10.0.0.0/16",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Address prefix for the Virtual Network"
      }
    },
    "subnetName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "subnet-services",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the subnet"
      }
    },
    "subnetAddressPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "10.0.1.0/24",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Address prefix for the subnet"
      }
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat('stor', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Storage Account"
      }
    },
    "storageAccountType": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_LRS",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Standard_LRS",
        "Standard_GRS",
        "Standard_RAGRS",
        "Standard_ZRS",
        "Premium_LRS"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Storage Account type"
      }
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat('sql-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the SQL Server"
      }
    },
    "sqlAdministratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "sqladmin",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL Server administrator login"
      }
    },
    "sqlAdministratorPassword": {
      "type": "securestring",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL Server administrator password"
      }
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "sampledb",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the SQL Database"
      }
    },
    "sqlDatabaseSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "S0",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL Database SKU"
      }
    },
    "allowPublicAccess": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Allow public access as fallback"
      }
    },
    "onPremisesIpAddress": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "On-premises IP address for firewall rule (optional)"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "storageAccountId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]",
    "sqlServerId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]",
    "vnetId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]",
    "subnetId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName'))]",
    "serviceEndpoints": [
      {
        "service": "Microsoft.Storage",
        "locations": [
          "[parameters('location')]"
        ]
      },
      {
        "service": "Microsoft.Sql",
        "locations": [
          "[parameters('location')]"
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "2023-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('vnetName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "[parameters('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "[parameters('subnetName')]",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "[parameters('subnetAddressPrefix')]",
              "serviceEndpoints": "[variables('serviceEndpoints')]",
              "privateEndpointNetworkPolicies": "Enabled",
              "privateLinkServiceNetworkPolicies": "Enabled"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[variables('vnetId')]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('storageAccountType')]"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {
        "accessTier": "Hot",
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false,
        "allowSharedKeyAccess": true,
        "publicNetworkAccess": "[if(parameters('allowPublicAccess'), 'Enabled', 'Disabled')]",
        "networkAcls": {
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "defaultAction": "[if(parameters('allowPublicAccess'), 'Allow', 'Deny')]",
          "virtualNetworkRules": [
            {
              "id": "[variables('subnetId')]",
              "action": "Allow"
            }
          ],
          "ipRules": "[if(empty(parameters('onPremisesIpAddress')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('value', parameters('onPremisesIpAddress'), 'action', 'Allow')))]"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-02-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[variables('vnetId')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('sqlAdministratorPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0",
        "minimalTlsVersion": "1.2",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "[if(parameters('allowPublicAccess'), 'Enabled', 'Disabled')]"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "virtualNetworkRules",
          "apiVersion": "2023-02-01-preview",
          "name": "[concat(parameters('subnetName'), '-vnet-rule')]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[variables('sqlServerId')]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "virtualNetworkSubnetId": "[variables('subnetId')]",
            "ignoreMissingVnetServiceEndpoint": false
          }
        },
        {
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2023-02-01-preview",
          "name": "AllowAllAzureIps",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[variables('sqlServerId')]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
            "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
          },
          "condition": "[parameters('allowPublicAccess')]"
        },
        {
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2023-02-01-preview",
          "name": "OnPremisesAccess",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[variables('sqlServerId')]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "[parameters('onPremisesIpAddress')]",
            "endIpAddress": "[parameters('onPremisesIpAddress')]"
          },
          "condition": "[and(parameters('allowPublicAccess'), not(empty(parameters('onPremisesIpAddress'))))]"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2023-02-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[variables('sqlServerId')]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseSku')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "maxSizeBytes": 2147483648,
        "catalogCollation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "zoneRedundant": false,
        "readScale": "Disabled",
        "requestedBackupStorageRedundancy": "Local"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "vnetId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('vnetId')]"
    },
    "subnetId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('subnetId')]"
    },
    "storageAccountId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('storageAccountId')]"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    },
    "sqlServerId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('sqlServerId')]"
    },
    "sqlServerFqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(variables('sqlServerId')).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
    }
  }
}
